description: A customer wants to know the maximum towing capacity of their truck.

nodes.task_description: Get the vehicle's VIN to identify the exact model, engine, and any towing packages installed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the VIN and identifies the specific configuration.

nodes.task_description: Look up the official towing capacity for that specific configuration in the manufacturer's database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the maximum towing capacity is 11,500 lbs.

nodes.task_description: Provide the towing capacity to the customer and remind them to account for passenger and cargo weight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the correct capacity and provides helpful context.
